title: Pay Our Border Patrol and Customs Agents Act of 2025
short_title: Pay Our Border Patrol and Customs Agents Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill makes sure that Border Patrol agents and customs officers get paid during government shutdowns in 2025. These workers have to keep working even when the government shuts down to protect our borders. The bill sets aside special Treasury money to pay their salaries and expenses when other government funding stops. This way, these important border security workers will still receive their paychecks even if other parts of the government are not funded.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Appropriations.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Pay Our Border Patrol and Customs Agents Act of twenty twenty-five.

sections.title: Section 2 Payment of Salaries of Certain CBP Employees Working During a Government Shutdown
sections.text: The government sets aside money for the year twenty twenty-five to pay certain border workers during a government shutdown. This money comes from the Treasury and is not being used for other things. The workers who will get paid are Border Patrol agents and customs officers who work for U.S. Customs and Border Protection. These workers must be the ones who are required to keep working even when the government shuts down. They will get their regular pay and work expenses covered during any government shutdown that happens in twenty twenty-five after this law is passed.
